originalTitle: 'The weapons were loud, but there was always music': Sudanese band play on through the war
title: 'The weapons were loud, but there was always music': Sudanese band play on through the war
content: One of Sudan's most popular bands, Aswat Almadina, recall being in the studio when the war broke out three years ago.

originalTitle: Millions listen to Ethiopian star's song taking swipe at government
title: A Super Song for Friends and Family in Ethiopia!
content:
Hello, Friends! Guess What's Happening in Ethiopia?

Hi everyone! Your friendly news reporter from Africa is here! Guess what exciting news we have today from a beautiful country called Ethiopia. Ethiopia is a big country in Africa. It has lovely mountains and kind people. Something special is happening there right now. A very famous singer has a new song. Lots and lots of people are listening to it! It is a song with a very important message for everyone. It is about being friends and helping each other. Let's find out more about this special song and the super singer!

Who is Teddy Afro? A Super Star!

Our super singer's name is Teddy Afro. He is like a music king in Ethiopia! Many people love his songs. His music makes people happy. He sings about many things. He often sings about his country, Ethiopia. He also sings about love and peace. Teddy Afro is very popular. When he sings, everyone listens. He is known all over Ethiopia. His songs are played on radios and TVs. Children and grown-ups all enjoy his wonderful music. He is a truly special artist. *Did you know?* Ethiopia is one of the oldest countries in Africa! It has a long and amazing history with ancient kingdoms and unique traditions.

What is His New Song About?

Teddy Afro's new song is super special. It talks about people being friends. It asks everyone to work together. The song's big message is about "unity." What is unity? It means being together. It means everyone gets along. Imagine your school class. If everyone plays together nicely, that is unity! If everyone helps each other, that is unity! Teddy Afro sings that everyone in Ethiopia should be united. He wants everyone to feel like one big family. He believes that when people are united, they can do amazing things. This message is very important for all of us.

Why is Unity Important?

Unity is like a strong glue. It holds people together. When people are united, they are strong. They can solve problems easily. Think about a team playing football. If everyone plays together, they win! If they don't, they might lose. It's the same for a country. When people are united, the country becomes happier. It becomes stronger too. Everyone can share ideas. Everyone can help build good things. Unity helps us live in peace. It helps us grow and be kind to each other. Teddy Afro wants this for all of Ethiopia. *Did you know?* The African Union, which is like a big club for African countries, also believes in unity for all of Africa to make our continent strong and peaceful!

Millions of People Are Listening!

Wow! Guess how many people are listening to Teddy Afro's new song? Millions! Yes, that's right, millions of people! It's like everyone knows the song. They sing along with it. They share it with their friends and family. This shows that the message is important to many. People want to be united. They want peace. They want to live happily together. When so many people listen, it shows how much they care. The song is reaching hearts all over Ethiopia. It is making people think about being good neighbors. It is making them think about helping each other. It is truly a powerful song!

What Does He Want to Say to Leaders?

In his song, Teddy Afro also talks to the leaders of Ethiopia. Who are leaders? They are the people who help run the country. They make important decisions. They help everyone live safely. Teddy Afro hopes that the leaders will listen. He hopes they will help everyone be more united. He wants leaders to make sure everyone works together. He wants them to help people be friends. He sings about wanting peace for his country. He believes that if leaders and people work together, Ethiopia will be amazing. He wants a happy and strong Ethiopia for all children. *Did you know?* Leaders in a country are like the principal in your school. They make sure things run smoothly and everyone is safe and treated fairly.

What Can We Learn from Teddy Afro's Song?

This song has a big lesson for all of us, even for children! We can all help create unity. How? By being kind! By sharing our toys. By helping a friend who is sad. By playing nicely with everyone. When we are kind to others, we build friendship. Friendship is the start of unity. Every small act of kindness makes a big difference. If we all try to be friends, our homes and our schools will be happy places. Then, our towns and countries will be happy too! So, let's all be like Teddy Afro and sing a song for unity in our own lives!

Let's Sing for Peace and Friendship!

So, there you have it! A wonderful story from Ethiopia. A famous singer, Teddy Afro, is singing a song. This song tells everyone to be united. It tells them to be friends and work together. Millions of people are listening. They want peace and happiness. Let us all remember Teddy Afro's message. Let us try to be kind to everyone we meet. Let us try to make our world a happier place, full of friendship and unity. Just like a big, happy family! Hooray for Teddy Afro and his amazing song!
summary: Ethiopian superstar Teddy Afro has released a new song asking everyone in his country, including leaders, to come together and be united as friends and one big family.
whyMatters: This is important because when people and leaders work together, a country can be strong, peaceful, and happy for everyone, especially for children who need a safe place to grow and play.

originalTitle: Why Man City 'leg-beaters' can make difference against Arsenal - Pulis
title: Why Man City 'leg-beaters' can make difference against Arsenal - Pulis
